2.4.3-focus-order.remarks: Focus escapes modal dialogs (refine-modal, quickview-modal, smart-snippet-feedback-modal) and popover when tabbing, due to broken focus trap (undefined scope in atomic-focus-trap). See KIT-5811. All non-modal components pass (search box, facets, pager, sort dropdown, results-per-page, tabs, segmented facet, result list, load-more, smart snippet).
